title: 2017 SUPRA SA 400
description: T he 2017 Supra SA 400 offered by SouthTown Watersports in Charlotte, North Carolina delivers the kind of balance wake athletes and families crave—plenty of punch for serious sessions, with the comfort and style to unwind between sets. Measuring 22.5 feet in length, with an 8.5-foot beam and a 2.3-foot draft, this SA 400 finds the sweet spot between performance precision and all-day usability. Its deep seating arrangement comfortably fits up to 16, giving everyone a front-row experience to the action behind the boat. Performance begins with the 350-horsepower V-drive engine that powers crisp acceleration and steady pull. Supra’s proven hull design partners with oversized upgraded ballast bags, lead bags, and a surf exhaust to fine-tune wakesurf and wakeboard conditions to your liking. Riders can push progression on smooth, predictable waves shaped with the SA’s technology, while passengers enjoy the deep, secure cockpit and high-quality sound from the integrated JL Audio system. The surf exhaust ensures cleaner, quieter sessions with reduced fumes in the surf zone. Below the surface, the SA 400’s hull design works efficiently to blend surf wave height and clean transfer, giving wakeboarders a solid lip and surfers a smooth push. Its V-drive layout creates interior space that feels open yet secure, delivering both lake-day comfort and a competition-ready setup. Attention to balance, noise control, and performance makes this model a standout among 22-foot class inboards—responsive enough for advanced riders, yet forgiving for those learning new tricks. At SouthTown Watersports in Charlotte, the local waters provide the perfect setting to experience what the Supra SA 400 can do. Known for their deep experience in wakeboat performance, the SouthTown team can walk through this 2017 SA’s setup and maintenance details, ensuring it fits your riding style and expectations. Whether you’re dialing in surf settings for long glassy runs or pulling a full crew across your favorite Carolina lake, the SA 400 has the precision, space, and power to make it happen—every time you drop in behind it.

title: 2022 MOOMBA MOJO
description: The 2022 Moomba Mojo brings the ideal balance of power, space, and control to the 23-foot wake segment. Designed to keep everyone comfortable while producing top-tier surf and wake performance, this used Mojo delivers the same excitement and reliability that have made Moomba a go-to brand among families who love being on the water. With room for up to 17 people, it’s built for those weekends when everyone shows up ready to ride, lounge, and make memories on the lake. Under the deck, a 400-horsepower V-drive engine pairs with Moomba’s proven performance hull design, ensuring crisp handling and a clean, customizable wake. Whether you’re pulling up a first-time wakesurfer or dialing in a competitive wakeboard set, the Mojo has the ballast capacity, thrust, and precision you need. Its wide 8.5-foot beam creates extra stability and space, while the modest 2.3-foot draft keeps it nimble in shallow coves and marina waters. This particular Mojo from SouthTown Watersports in Charlotte, North Carolina, includes some valuable upgrades that make the difference during long summer days — a stern shade for extra cover at anchor, a Pro Tower for board storage and tow points, and a rear seat back kit that turns the cockpit into a social lounge. Underwater lighting sets the mood for evening cruises, while docking lights and a bow windscreen round out convenience and style for those late-day returns to the dock. From Lake Norman to Lake Wylie, this Mojo is equally at home delivering smooth surf sessions or just offering a comfortable spot to relax with friends. The combination of Moomba’s smart wake systems, reliable Indmar power, and passenger-friendly design makes this a standout in its class. SouthTown Watersports is known throughout the Carolinas for premium service, expert setup, and a genuine understanding of what wakesport families need. If you’re ready for a 23-foot wake boat that does it all — and does it with style — the 2022 Moomba Mojo is ready to make every set count.

title: New Xcursion RFX 243 2023 – Graphite Metallic / Frost White
description: The Xcursion 243 RFX is great for larger crews who want to make the most out of their time on the water. The RFX line of boats feature wrap-around style seating in both the front and rear of the boat, this allows for more people to sit comfortably in the boat. Additionally, the 243 RFX has an extended rear swim platform to allow easy movement around the engine and quick access both to and from the ladder. This specific Xcursion 243 RFX is loaded to the brim with options to make your time on the water even more enjoyable. To kick things off, this boat is equipped with Xcursion’s Deluxe Package upgrade which gives you a raised helm, premium steering wheel, flip-up cleats, 2 subwoofers, and a black acrylic table. Additionally, this boat is equipped with RGB back-list speakers, under deck lighting, under helm lighting, and much more. Powering this gorgeous all-black boat is a powerful Mercury 225 HP Outboard. This 225 HP engine is extremely powerful and makes getting around the lake far more enjoyable! What sets Xcursion Pontoons apart from their competitors? To kick things off, Xcursion Pontoons believe that high quality with exceptional durability is the only way to build a pontoon. Each pontoon features a fully welded C-Channel bow and extended swim deck along with full-length interior risers. This helps increase ride quality by eliminating unwanted flex. As for the construction of the actual pontoons, Xcursion also uses extruded splash fins to prevent unwanted spray along with a reinforced power keel to provide better tracking and more protection to the pontoons when being beached. #boatdudedeals
